creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
Greetings!

As stated on https://www.freetype.org/#news in the entry
“FreeType moved to freedesktop.org” dated 2021-01-16:
> […] which have been renamed to freetype and freetype-demos (this is, we are
> dropping the ‘2’ in the repository names)

Should the same happen with print/freetype2 ?
Be aware: there is a port print/freetype for version 1.3.1 (which
should—in this case—be renamed to print/freetype1 I suppose).

Regards,
 Kalten
